creator: rwatson@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

Transition to analyzed: I agree, and this is not the first such report 
of issues with ACLs updating mtime.  An interesting question is whether 
mtime updates should occur for user extattr writes, but I'd be fine 
with seeing those go also.  The right answer is probably not to update 
the time stamps for any IO_EXT writes in UFS2; I'll take a look and see 
how obvious such a change would be to make.
